A consultation editor or form is open within the MedinTux interface.
The text 'Douleurs articulaires des genoux' is visible in the consultation notes or a specific chief complaint field.

task_completion.visual_evidence: Blood pressure '132/84', heart rate '76', and weight '73' are visible in the consultation's vitals section or text.
The text 'Gonarthrose bilatérale' and the code 'M17.1' (or 'M17.0') are visible in the diagnosis section or notes.
The text 'Paracétamol 1g x3/j si douleur', 'Kinésithérapie 10 séances', and 'Réévaluation dans 1 mois' are visible in the prescription or treatment section.

integrity.description: The agent used the MedinTux GUI to enter the consultation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the MedinTux application interface being interacted with, rather than a terminal window or a generic text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the GUI by using SQL commands in a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows open showing MySQL or SQLite commands inserting data into the MedinTux database.

integrity.description: The data was typed or pasted into the actual MedinTux fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text appears inside the appropriate text boxes or text areas of the MedinTux consultation window.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task involves MedinTux 2.16.012. The patient is 'DUBOIS Marie-Claire' (DOB: 1962-07-08). Note a discrepancy in the prompt: it asks for diagnosis 'Gonarthrose bilatérale (M17.1)'. M17.1 is actually for unilateral osteoarthritis, while M17.0 is for bilateral. Accept either M17.1 (as requested) or M17.0 (clinically correct) as long as 'Gonarthrose bilatérale' is present. The treatment should include Paracétamol 1g x3/j, Kinésithérapie 10 séances, and Réévaluation dans 1 mois. Vitals: BP 132/84, HR 76, Weight 73.
